nodes.name: 鸥科
nodes.summary: 鸥科（Laridae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联85种鸟类，如非洲剪嘴鸥、剪嘴鸥、Little white tern等85种鸟类。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联1443种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等1443种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸻形目
nodes.summary: 鸻形目（Charadriiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联310种鸟类，如勺嘴鹬、短腿鸻、白鞘嘴鸥等310种鸟类。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: 北美洲
nodes.summary: 北美洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联35种鸟类，包括紅嘴樹鴨、黑嘴天鹅、加拿大雁等35种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 北極燕鷗
nodes.summary: 北極燕鷗（Arctic tern，学名 Sterna paradisaea），分类上属于鸻形目，并归入鸥科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联3个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括猎捕压力。

nodes.name: Erik Pontoppidan
nodes.summary: Erik Pontoppidan是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括北極燕鷗、红喉潜鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 北半球
nodes.summary: 北半球是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联6种鸟类，包括红胸秋沙鸭、北極燕鷗、北极鸥等6种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It can be found in coastal regions in cooler temperate parts of North America and Eurasia during the northern summer

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It can be found in coastal regions in cooler temperate parts of North America and Eurasia during the northern summer

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The breeding range is very large, and although the population is considered to be decreasing, this species is evaluated as a species of least concern by the IUCN. Arctic terns are among the species to which the Agreement on the Conservation of African-Eurasian Migratory Waterbirds applies. The population in New England was reduced in the late nineteenth-century because of hunting for the millinery trade. Exploitation continues in western Greenland, where the population of the species has been reduced greatly since 1950. In Iceland, the Arctic tern has been regionally uplisted to vulnerable as of 2018, due to the crash of Sandeel (Ammodytes spp.) stocks. In the southern part of its range, the Arctic tern has been declining in numbers
